message:
deploy: Dockerfiles + RULAKE_ALLOWED_HOSTS for mcp-rvdna + mcp-ruqu

Issue #2 step 1-2: containerization for the rvdna + ruqu MCP companions.

Dockerfile.mcp-rvdna + Dockerfile.mcp-ruqu — siblings of Dockerfile.mcp,
multi-stage (rust:1-bookworm builder → distroless/cc-debian12:nonroot
runtime), BuildKit cache mounts on the cargo registry + per-target
build dirs.

mcp-rvdna + mcp-ruqu http.rs both gain the RULAKE_ALLOWED_HOSTS env
var (port of mcp-server iter-51 fix). Without it, rmcp's DNS-rebinding
guard 403s any non-loopback request whose Host header doesn't match
the bind. Behind Cloud Run / Cloudflare, the Host is the user-facing
domain, not 0.0.0.0:8080. Same allowlist pattern: push the bind addr
+ env-supplied extras.

Both binaries cargo build --release clean.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# ruqu-mcp — distroless image for the ruQu MCP companion (ADR-008 §6).
+#
+# Sibling to Dockerfile.mcp; same multi-stage shape.
+#
+# Build:  docker build -f Dockerfile.mcp-ruqu -t ruqu-mcp .
+# Run:    docker run --rm -p 7442:7442 ruqu-mcp http \
+#             --bind 0.0.0.0:7442 --capabilities read,publish
+
+# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.7
+
+FROM rust:1-bookworm AS builder
+WORKDIR /work
+
+COPY . .
+
+RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/usr/local/cargo/registry \
+    --mount=type=cache,target=/work/mcp-ruqu/target \
+    cargo build --release --manifest-path mcp-ruqu/Cargo.toml --bin ruqu-mcp \
+    && cp mcp-ruqu/target/release/ruqu-mcp /usr/local/bin/ruqu-mcp
+
+# ── runtime stage ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+FROM gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12:nonroot
+COPY --from=builder /usr/local/bin/ruqu-mcp /usr/local/bin/ruqu-mcp
+
+EXPOSE 7442
+USER nonroot:nonroot
+
+ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/ruqu-mcp"]
+CMD ["stdio"]

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+# rvdna-mcp — distroless image for the rvDNA MCP companion (ADR-007 §6).
+#
+# Sibling to Dockerfile.mcp; same multi-stage shape:
+# 1. `builder` — full Rust toolchain, builds rvdna-mcp in --release.
+# 2. `runtime` — distroless/cc with just the binary.
+#
+# Build:  docker build -f Dockerfile.mcp-rvdna -t rvdna-mcp .
+# Run:    docker run --rm -p 7441:7441 rvdna-mcp http \
+#             --bind 0.0.0.0:7441 --capabilities read,internal
+
+# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.7
+
+FROM rust:1-bookworm AS builder
+WORKDIR /work
+
+COPY . .
+
+RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/usr/local/cargo/registry \
+    --mount=type=cache,target=/work/mcp-rvdna/target \
+    cargo build --release --manifest-path mcp-rvdna/Cargo.toml --bin rvdna-mcp \
+    && cp mcp-rvdna/target/release/rvdna-mcp /usr/local/bin/rvdna-mcp
+
+# ── runtime stage ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+FROM gcr.io/distroless/cc-debian12:nonroot
+COPY --from=builder /usr/local/bin/rvdna-mcp /usr/local/bin/rvdna-mcp
+
+EXPOSE 7441
+USER nonroot:nonroot
+
+ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/rvdna-mcp"]
+CMD ["stdio"]
